name: Whole Wheat Irish Soda Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the setting for making Whole Wheat Bread.
2. Mix together the bread flour, whole wheat flour, salt, baking soda, and caraway seeds in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the butter, buttermilk, raisins, and yeast until well mixed.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring continuously until a dough forms.
5. Transfer the dough to your Panasonic bread-making machine and select the Whole Wheat Bread setting.
6. Pour in the remaining 1 cup of buttermilk.
7. Cook according to the machine's instructions.
8. Remove the finished loaf from the machine and let it cool on a wire rack before serving.
